Interactive IAL History Lesson — The Nature of Autocratic Rule
Fully interactive Moodle-embedded lesson built from Edexcel IAL specification. Tabbed navigation, collapsible sections, progress tracking, and four activity types: True/False, Multiple Choice, Sorting, and Drag-and-Drop Sequencing. Built with custom HTML/CSS/JS — no external authoring tools required.

About

I am an instructional designer and curriculum developer with over 12 years of international teaching experience across England, France, and online platforms. My background combines a UK PGCE, a degree in History and Social Studies, and hands-on experience building digital learning experiences for secondary and adult learners.

I currently work as History Course Manager at Brave Generation Academy, where I design and build Moodle-based learning experiences for IAL and IGCSE Pearson curricula — from spec alignment and content development to interactive H5P activities and custom embedded tools.

I integrate AI systematically into my production workflow, allowing me to produce high-quality, pedagogically sound digital content faster and more consistently. My goal is always the same: learning experiences that are clear, engaging, and built to achieve real outcomes.
